capture.geometry: Geometry Nodes only; the post-GN Bevel modifier is disabled in Blender

interpretation: Camera and geometry align, but whole-asset shader parity fails. The few large filament faces occlude much of the high-triangle-count flat.w diagnostic geometry, and their browser reconstruction is much brighter than Blender Eevee. The generic flat.w Background contract is implemented; the next material target for this asset is the filament shader plus its lighting environment.
